Running: apply controls against observations...
Done:    apply controls against observations (2 files, 14ms)
Hint:
  stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-31-prefix-unsafe-explicit/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-31-prefix-unsafe-explicit/observations

Next steps:
  1. Identify the root cause: `stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-31-prefix-unsafe-explicit/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-31-prefix-unsafe-explicit/observations`
  2. View a summary: `stave apply --format text`
  3. Export findings to a file: `stave apply --format json > findings.json`
